name: Remoulade Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise and Durkee's Famous Sauce in a bowl.
2. Gradually pour in the olive oil while stirring.
3. Beat the mixture until it reaches a consistency similar to mayonnaise.
4. Add the Creole or Poupon mustard and beat again.
5. Incorporate the horseradish, catsup, wine vinegar, Lea & Perrins Worcestershire Sauce, and Tabasco sauce one at a time, beating after each addition.
6. Season with salt to taste.
7. Use this sauce over shrimp on salad or as a sandwich sauce. Some people enjoy it over desserts, but the author doesn't believe them.
